revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-185

A relay which locks mechanically when operated and remains operated although the control current is removed. A separate operation is required to release the relay.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Latching relay}}
